topics.title: Crystal Ball Narrative
topics.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for compressing changing miniature worlds into one consistent crystal ball object.

en.title: Crystal Ball Narrative
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for compressing changing miniature worlds into one consistent crystal ball object.

zh-CN.title: 水晶球叙事
zh-CN.description: 把变化的微缩世界压进同一颗水晶球，测试主体连续性。

topics.title: High-Speed Freeze
topics.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for freezing fast physical events with controlled macro studio clarity.

en.title: High-Speed Freeze
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for freezing fast physical events with controlled macro studio clarity.

zh-CN.title: 高速摄影级定格
zh-CN.description: 用受控微距棚拍清晰定格高速物理瞬间。

topics.title: Tessellation Pattern
topics.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for seamless geometric tiling, optical illusion structure, and Escher-like interlocking silhouettes.

en.title: Tessellation Pattern
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for seamless geometric tiling, optical illusion structure, and Escher-like interlocking silhouettes.

zh-CN.title: 无缝拼贴
zh-CN.description: 测试无缝几何平铺、视觉错觉结构和 Escher 式互嵌轮廓。

topics.title: Thinking Mode
topics.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for turning research, trend reasoning, and multi-step analysis into structured editorial images.

en.title: Thinking Mode
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for turning research, trend reasoning, and multi-step analysis into structured editorial images.

zh-CN.title: Thinking Mode
zh-CN.description: 把研究、趋势判断和多步分析转化成结构化编辑插画。

packages.title: Oracle Seasons
packages.description: A reference-dependent series: one base crystal ball followed by seasonal variations preserving the same object.
packages.creative_direction: True continuity series: image 01 establishes the crystal ball, brass stand, table position, lighting and camera angle; images 02-04 depend on 01 as --ref.

en.title: Oracle Seasons
en.description: A reference-dependent series: one base crystal ball followed by seasonal variations preserving the same object.

zh-CN.title: 四季预言球
zh-CN.description: 一张基准水晶球，后续季节变化都依赖它保持同一主体。

packages.title: Impact Studies
packages.description: Three independent high-speed impact prompts that can run fully in parallel.
packages.creative_direction: Independent single-image package: no reference dependency, shared black studio language, designed to fill queue slots safely.

en.title: Impact Studies
en.description: Three independent high-speed impact prompts that can run fully in parallel.

zh-CN.title: 冲击研究
zh-CN.description: 三张互相独立、可完全并发运行的高速冲击提示词。

packages.title: Living Tiles
packages.description: A reference-dependent series: one base tessellation tile followed by three material and subject variations preserving the same seamless geometry.
packages.creative_direction: True geometry-continuity series: image 01 establishes the interlocking tile lattice; images 02-04 depend on 01 as --ref and reinterpret the same seamless structure through coral, moth, and city materials.

en.title: Living Tiles
en.description: A reference-dependent series: one base tessellation tile followed by three material and subject variations preserving the same seamless geometry.

zh-CN.title: 活体瓷砖
zh-CN.description: 一张基准无缝拼贴图，后续三张以不同材质和主体延续同一几何结构。

packages.title: Market Reasoning
packages.description: A reference-dependent editorial series about turning market signals into one consistent visual reasoning system.
packages.creative_direction: Image 01 establishes a hand-drawn editorial market mountain language; images 02-04 reuse that same layout grammar and character system while changing the reasoning layer.

en.title: Market Reasoning
en.description: A reference-dependent editorial series about turning market signals into one consistent visual reasoning system.

zh-CN.title: 市场推理图
zh-CN.description: 把市场信号转成一套连续的编辑插画推理系统。

packages.title: Reasoning Studies
packages.description: Three independent images testing structured visual reasoning without reference dependencies.
packages.creative_direction: Independent studies for the Thinking Mode theme: each image converts a different reasoning workflow into a clear editorial or product-like visual system.

en.title: Reasoning Studies
en.description: Three independent images testing structured visual reasoning without reference dependencies.

zh-CN.title: 推理单图研究
zh-CN.description: 三张不依赖参考图的结构化视觉推理单图。
